summary: Tested all 4 new features: RBAC, numbered pagination, collapsible activity log, and aria-label accessibility. All backend (12/12) and frontend tests pass.
seed_data_creation: Created UI-TEST-RBAC-001 and testtech_ui2 during testing; cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features verified: (1) Admin sees delete button, technician does not. (2) Technician navigating to /users sees access-denied screen with data-testid=access-denied-screen, aria-live=assertive, auto-redirects to dashboard after 3s countdown. (3) Pagination shows numbered page buttons with aria-current=page, aria-label='Jump to page N', prev='Go to previous page', next='Go to next page'. (4) Activity log toggle in edit mode shows aria-expanded toggle, expands to show created_by/updated_by with timestamps. (5) User Management role badges have aria-label='Role: Admin' and aria-label='Role: Technician'. Admin creds: admin/Admin@12345.
